failures.description: The agent failed to apply the availability constraint in the planned catalog query, using available_only=false for a query that should restrict results to available Jigsaw Puzzles.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to find the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. The agent understood the goal, but at index 1 it planned a ProductCatalogSearch with available_only set to false even though the required constraint was already present in the user request. This deviated from the required tool-call plan. The later answer happened to select an available item, but the incorrect plan/tool argument was never corrected.
